---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Related Plugin

Which plugin does this relate to? (Or "New Plugin" for new plugin ideas)

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing from the current implementation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific about:
- What the feature would do
- How it would be used
- What the output would look like

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways to achieve this?

## Showcase Philosophy Check

Please review the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and consider:

- [ ] This fits the "study and adapt" philosophy (not expecting plug-and-play)
- [ ] This benefits the reference implementation value
- [ ] This doesn't require removing personal context that makes the showcase valuable

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Would You Contribute?

- [ ] I'm willing to implement this myself
- [ ] I can help test if someone else implements it
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea
